The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The user gives data: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-340C89E1, blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers. They want exactly that. No extra formatting. So produce:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-340C89E1
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

That matches. Should be exactly three lines. No additional text. The user says "Return the three-line status record." So we must output exactly that.

Thus answer is:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-340C89E1
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

That's it.
</think>
